<thought>
I’m facing right (`>`). There are lava tiles (`L`) everywhere along the central corridors, and the goal `G` is down and slightly to the right. To avoid lava, I should first turn downward so I can look for a safe path toward the bottom-right goal area.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>
